Back to home

AI agents for Agency businesses

Verified visitors can explore sales, follow-up, booking, social, and custom workflow agents for Agency operations.

Lead Generation#01

AI Lead Generation Agent

Finds qualified prospects by industry, region, role, and buying intent.

business_value

AI Lead Generation Agent is built to finds qualified prospects by industry, region, role, and buying intent. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: collect market signals -> score prospects -> prepare outreach.

solves

Collect market signals is still handled manually or inconsistently., Score prospects depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::collect market signals
analyze::score prospects
output::prepare outreach
View full agent page
Lead Generation#02

AI Client Acquisition Agent

Runs qualification, follow-ups, lead scoring, and sales pipeline movement.

business_value

AI Client Acquisition Agent is built to runs qualification, follow-ups, lead scoring, and sales pipeline movement. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: capture lead -> analyze fit -> trigger follow-up.

solves

Capture lead is still handled manually or inconsistently., Analyze fit depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::capture lead
analyze::analyze fit
output::trigger follow-up
View full agent page
Email Automation#03

AI Cold Email Agent

Creates personalized outbound emails and response-aware sequences.

business_value

AI Cold Email Agent is built to creates personalized outbound emails and response-aware sequences. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: research lead -> draft email -> track reply.

solves

Research lead is still handled manually or inconsistently., Draft email depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::research lead
analyze::draft email
output::track reply

AI Follow-Up Agent

Sends timely follow-ups based on lead status, interest, and replies.

business_value

AI Follow-Up Agent is built to sends timely follow-ups based on lead status, interest, and replies. Instead of waiting for a person to remember the next step, it turns the process into a measurable workflow: detect stage -> draft next touch -> schedule send.

solves

Detect stage is still handled manually or inconsistently., Draft next touch depends on memory, spreadsheets, or scattered notes.

input::detect stage
analyze::draft next touch
output::schedule send

solves

input::qualify
analyze::match calendar
output::send invite

solves

solves

input::read profile
analyze::score signals
output::rank priority

solves

solves
